languages.text: "Я сотворю Триасомату из себя, Нунциуса и ксенотехнологий. Прошлый опыт был неудачным, но с тех пор я постиг истинные причины провала — одних Имперских технологий недостаточно, чтобы обуздать эту скверну. Я должен прибегнуть к запретному. Здесь все еще остались образцы наших некронских находок. Они помогут совершить идеальный переход".

"I will create a Triasomata of myself, Nuncius, and xenotechnology. The previous attempt was a failure, but since then, I have realised the true reasons for it — Imperial technology alone is not enough to restrain this corruption. I must resort to forbidden knowledge. There are still samples of our Necron finds here. They will allow me to perform the perfect transfer."
languages.original_text: "Я сотворю Триасомату из себя, Нунциуса и ксенотехнологий. Прошлый опыт был неудачным, но с тех пор я постиг истинные причины провала — одних Имперских технологий недостаточно, чтобы обуздать эту скверну. Я должен прибегнуть к запретному. Здесь все еще остались образцы наших некронских находок. Они помогут совершить идеальный переход".

I must resort to forbidden knowledge. There are still samples of our Necron finds here. They will allow me to perform the perfect transfer."

"I will create a Triasomata of myself, Nuncius, and xenotechnology. The previous attempt was a failure, but since then, I have realised the true reasons for it — Imperial technology alone is not enough to restrain this corruption. I must resort to forbidden knowledge. There are still samples of our Necron finds here. They will allow me to perform the perfect transfer."

languages.text: «Crearé un triasómata con Nuncius, la xenotecnología y conmigo mismo. Fracasé la última vez que lo intenté, pero he tenido tiempo para averiguar el motivo: la tecnología del Imperium no basta para contener esta corrupción. Debo recurrir a conocimientos prohibidos. Aún quedan muestras aquí de nuestros hallazgos cuando estudiamos a los Necrones. Con ellas podré llevar a cabo una transferencia perfecta».
languages.original_text: "I will create a Triasomata of myself, Nuncius, and xenotechnology. The previous attempt was a failure, but since then, I have realised the true reasons for it — Imperial technology alone is not enough to restrain this corruption. I must resort to forbidden knowledge. There are still samples of our Necron finds here. They will allow me to perform the perfect transfer."

traits.locale_text: «Crearé un triasómata con Nuncius, la xenotecnología y conmigo mismo. Fracasé la última vez que lo intenté, pero he tenido tiempo para averiguar el motivo: la tecnología del Imperium no basta para contener esta corrupción. Debo recurrir a conocimientos prohibidos. Aún quedan muestras aquí de nuestros hallazgos cuando estudiamos a los Necrones. Con ellas podré llevar a cabo una transferencia perfecta».

languages.text: “我会构建一个三相体，由我、努恩修斯和异形科技组成。之前的尝试失败了，但我后来明白了症结所在——单靠帝国科技不足以遏制这种腐化。我必须求助于禁忌知识。这里还有一些我们发现的太空死灵样本。有了它们，我就能实现完美的转化。”
languages.original_text: "I will create a Triasomata of myself, Nuncius, and xenotechnology. The previous attempt was a failure, but since then, I have realised the true reasons for it — Imperial technology alone is not enough to restrain this corruption. I must resort to forbidden knowledge. There are still samples of our Necron finds here. They will allow me to perform the perfect transfer."

traits.locale_text: “我会构建一个三相体，由我、努恩修斯和异形科技组成。之前的尝试失败了，但我后来明白了症结所在——单靠帝国科技不足以遏制这种腐化。我必须求助于禁忌知识。这里还有一些我们发现的太空死灵样本。有了它们，我就能实现完美的转化。”

languages.text: « Je vais créer un Triasomata constitué de moi-même, de Nuncius et de xénotechnologie. J'ai compris pourquoi ma première tentative s'est soldée par un échec : la technologie de l'Imperium à elle seule n'est pas suffisante pour endiguer cette corruption. Je dois avoir recours à des connaissances interdites. Il reste des échantillons de ce que nous avons découvert sur les Nécrons dans ce laboratoire. Ils me permettront de réaliser le transfert parfait. »
languages.original_text: "I will create a Triasomata of myself, Nuncius, and xenotechnology. The previous attempt was a failure, but since then, I have realised the true reasons for it — Imperial technology alone is not enough to restrain this corruption. I must resort to forbidden knowledge. There are still samples of our Necron finds here. They will allow me to perform the perfect transfer."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais créer un Triasomata constitué de moi-même, de Nuncius et de xénotechnologie. J'ai compris pourquoi ma première tentative s'est soldée par un échec : la technologie de l'Imperium à elle seule n'est pas suffisante pour endiguer cette corruption. Je dois avoir recours à des connaissances interdites. Il reste des échantillons de ce que nous avons découvert sur les Nécrons dans ce laboratoire. Ils me permettront de réaliser le transfert parfait. »

languages.text: "Kendimden, Nuncius'tan ve zeno teknolojisinden oluşan bir Üçyeköz yaratacağım. Önceki girişim başarısız oldu ama o günden sonra bunun gerçek nedenlerini kavradım. İmparatorluk teknolojisi tek başına bu yozlaşmayı dizginlemeye yetmiyor. Yasak irfana başvurmalıyım. Burada hâlâ Nekron buluntularımızın örnekleri duruyor. Kusursuz aktarımı gerçekleştirmemi sağlayacaklar."
languages.original_text: "I will create a Triasomata of myself, Nuncius, and xenotechnology. The previous attempt was a failure, but since then, I have realised the true reasons for it — Imperial technology alone is not enough to restrain this corruption. I must resort to forbidden knowledge. There are still samples of our Necron finds here. They will allow me to perform the perfect transfer."

traits.locale_text: "Kendimden, Nuncius'tan ve zeno teknolojisinden oluşan bir Üçyeköz yaratacağım. Önceki girişim başarısız oldu ama o günden sonra bunun gerçek nedenlerini kavradım. İmparatorluk teknolojisi tek başına bu yozlaşmayı dizginlemeye yetmiyor. Yasak irfana başvurmalıyım. Burada hâlâ Nekron buluntularımızın örnekleri duruyor. Kusursuz aktarımı gerçekleştirmemi sağlayacaklar."

languages.text: "Ich werde einen Triasomata aus mir selbst, Nuncius und Xenotechnologie herstellen. Der letzte Versuch war ein Fehlschlag, aber ich kenne mittlerweile die wahren Gründe dafür ... imperiale Technologie allein reicht nicht aus, um dieser Verderbnis Einhalt zu gebieten. Ich muss auf verbotenes Wissen zurückgreifen. Hier gibt es immer noch Proben unserer Necron-Funde. Sie werden mir den perfekten Transfer ermöglichen."
languages.original_text: "I will create a Triasomata of myself, Nuncius, and xenotechnology. The previous attempt was a failure, but since then, I have realised the true reasons for it — Imperial technology alone is not enough to restrain this corruption. I must resort to forbidden knowledge. There are still samples of our Necron finds here. They will allow me to perform the perfect transfer."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde einen Triasomata aus mir selbst, Nuncius und Xenotechnologie herstellen. Der letzte Versuch war ein Fehlschlag, aber ich kenne mittlerweile die wahren Gründe dafür ... imperiale Technologie allein reicht nicht aus, um dieser Verderbnis Einhalt zu gebieten. Ich muss auf verbotenes Wissen zurückgreifen. Hier gibt es immer noch Proben unserer Necron-Funde. Sie werden mir den perfekten Transfer ermöglichen."

languages.text: 「私は、私自身とヌンキウス、そして異星技術から成るトリアソマタを創り出します。先の試みは失敗でしたが、以来、私はその真の原因を悟りました――帝国の技術だけでは、この腐敗を抑え込むには足りないのです。私は禁じられた知識に頼らねばなりません。ここにはまだ、我々のネクロンの発掘品の標本が残っている。それらが、完璧な転写を可能にしてくれるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "I will create a Triasomata of myself, Nuncius, and xenotechnology. The previous attempt was a failure, but since then, I have realised the true reasons for it — Imperial technology alone is not enough to restrain this corruption. I must resort to forbidden knowledge. There are still samples of our Necron finds here. They will allow me to perform the perfect transfer."

traits.locale_text: 「私は、私自身とヌンキウス、そして異星技術から成るトリアソマタを創り出します。先の試みは失敗でしたが、以来、私はその真の原因を悟りました――帝国の技術だけでは、この腐敗を抑え込むには足りないのです。私は禁じられた知識に頼らねばなりません。ここにはまだ、我々のネクロンの発掘品の標本が残っている。それらが、完璧な転写を可能にしてくれるでしょう」
